---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement for the canonical mobile app repo
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user or contributor problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Scope notes

- Does this affect browsing, collection, pairing, playback, or contributor tooling?
- Does it require private infrastructure or credentials?
- What should stay out of scope?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or prior discussion.
